title: Vanish
body:
**/vanish**, plugin which makes **other** players think that you're **not** on the server


## Features:
- Invisibility toggler
- The vanished players still see themselves visible
- Tab telling you that you are vanished, and the others in the staff team


## Commands:
- /vanish
- /vanish <player>

## Permissions:
- vanish.use - Get vanished
- vanish.see - See vanished players

### Screenshot:
![Vanish Screenshot](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Mv4AIFSE/images/86129109452b90dbf2d317a601ed20bbe4da03bd.png 'Vanish Screenshot')
